text.title: DORA + Reliability Metrics Report Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in production. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Reported lead time is 2 hours; actual user-felt lead time (commit-to-prod) is 5 days because the merge-to-deploy step is manual.
antipattern.root-cause: Author measured merge-to-tag instead of commit-to-prod.
antipattern.fix: Re-define lead time as `prod_deploy_timestamp - first_commit_in_pr_timestamp`; re-run the historical query; expose the gap.

antipattern.symptom: Monthly chart shows 'high' Deployment Frequency; weekly chart reveals a 3-week gap caused by a freeze nobody documented.
antipattern.root-cause: Aggregation window chosen for stable-looking dashboards.
antipattern.fix: Report 7-day rolling counts + show the raw daily series alongside; alert on a 14-day flat-line.

antipattern.symptom: Change Failure Rate self-reported at 8%; deploy-linked incident query reveals 22%.
antipattern.root-cause: Author skipped the incident-data join and asked engineers to estimate.
antipattern.fix: Wire the incident ticket system to record `deploy_commit_sha`; join deploys with within-24h incidents to compute CFR.
